info.name: Core Backend Laravel API
info.description: API Collection for Core Backend Laravel Application

request.description: Login with email and password. Returns user data with roles and permissions.
Logout the current user and invalidate session.
Get current authenticated user profile with roles and permissions. Requires authentication.
Get list of all admins. Requires authentication and 'users.view' permission.
Create a new admin user. Requires authentication and 'users.create' permission.
Get a specific admin by ID. Requires authentication and 'users.view' permission.
Update an admin user. Requires authentication and 'users.update' permission.
Delete an admin user. Requires authentication and 'users.delete' permission.
Get list of all roles. Requires authentication and 'roles.view' permission.
Create a new role. Requires authentication and 'roles.create' permission.
Get a specific role by ID. Requires authentication and 'roles.view' permission.
Update a role. Requires authentication and 'roles.update' permission.
Delete a role. Requires authentication and 'roles.delete' permission.
Get list of all permissions. Requires authentication and 'permissions.view' permission.
Create a new permission. Requires authentication and 'permissions.create' permission.
Get a specific permission by ID. Requires authentication and 'permissions.view' permission.
Update a permission. Requires authentication and 'permissions.update' permission.
Delete a permission. Requires authentication and 'permissions.delete' permission.
Get list of all permission groups. Requires authentication and 'permission-groups.view' permission.
Create a new permission group. Requires authentication and 'permission-groups.create' permission.
Get a specific permission group by ID. Requires authentication and 'permission-groups.view' permission.
Update a permission group. Requires authentication and 'permission-groups.update' permission.
Delete a permission group. Requires authentication and 'permission-groups.delete' permission.
Get list of all staffs. Requires authentication and 'staff.view' permission.
Create a new staff. Requires authentication and 'staff.create' permission.
Get a specific staff by ID. Requires authentication and 'staff.view' permission.
Update a staff. Requires authentication and 'staff.update' permission.
Delete a staff. Requires authentication and 'staff.delete' permission.
Get staff commission summary report. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.reports.sales.view' permission.
Get staff commission detail report. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.reports.sales.view' permission.
Get my POS summary report. Requires authentication and 'reports.my-pos-summary.view' permission.
Send receipt email for an order. Requires authentication and 'pos.checkout' permission. Rate limited to 6 requests per minute.
Export products to CSV. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.products.view' permission.
Import products from CSV. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.products.create' permission.
Export shop menu items to CSV. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.shop-menu.view' permission.
Import shop menu items from CSV. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.shop-menu.create' permission.
Export categories to CSV. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.categories.view' permission.
Import categories from CSV. Requires authentication and 'ecommerce.categories.create' permission.
Export customers to CSV. Requires authentication and 'customers.view' permission.
Import customers from CSV. Requires authentication and 'customers.create' permission.
Get SEO global settings. Requires authentication.
Update SEO global settings. Requires authentication.
Upload SEO global image. Requires authentication.
Get list of booking services. Requires api.session middleware.
Get a specific booking service. Requires api.session middleware.
Get available service packages for a customer and service. Requires api.session middleware.
Get booking availability. Requires api.session middleware.
Get bulk booking availability. Requires api.session middleware.
Create a booking hold. Requires api.session middleware.
Get booking cart. Requires api.session middleware.
Add item to booking cart. Requires api.session middleware.
Remove item from booking cart. Requires api.session middleware.
Checkout booking cart. Requires api.session middleware.
Pay for a booking. Requires api.session middleware.
Reschedule a booking. Requires api.session middleware.
Booking payment callback. Requires api.session middleware.
Get my bookings. Requires api.session and auth:customer,sanctum middleware.
List appointments. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get appointment. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Update appointment status. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Upload appointment photo. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Admin reschedule booking. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get staff report. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Export staff report to CSV. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get summary report. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Export summary report to CSV. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get booking logs. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Export booking logs to CSV. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get notified cancellation voucher setting. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Update notified cancellation voucher setting. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
List booking services (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Create booking service (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get booking service (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Update booking service (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Delete booking service (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
List staff schedules (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Create staff schedule (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get staff schedule (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Update staff schedule (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Delete staff schedule (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
List blocks (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Create block (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Get block (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Update block (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Delete block (apiResource). Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
List commission tiers. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Create commission tier. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Update commission tier. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Delete commission tier. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
List commissions. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Override commission. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
Recalculate commissions. Requires api.session and auth:web,sanctum middleware.
